scope: Research Table / Research Note / Thaumonomicon visual cleanup and Scribing Tools refill parity
parity_changes: ResearchNoteScreen now reuses TC4ResearchTableParity constants for aspect grid and page-arrow hitboxes instead of duplicating hard-coded coordinates.
ResearchNoteScreen no longer shows debug-style TC4 hex labels/status messages over the original parchment note UI.
Thaumonomicon research pages no longer draw raw ConfigResearch key/category headers on visible pages.
Thaumonomicon text pages no longer render missing localization keys as visible placeholder page text.
Thaumonomicon recipe pages no longer display internal recipe keys, inferred pattern letters or debug field dumps in the visible book card.
Scribing Tools received a guarded original-style ink-sac refill helper and a shapeless ink-sac refill recipe path using the existing thaumcraft:scribing_tools item, not a duplicate item.
non_goals: No new research progression was added.
No duplicate research-note crafting recipe was added.
No right-click refill mechanic was added for Scribing Tools.
No fake Thaumonomicon recipes/pages were invented.
still_not_100_percent: Research Table and Research Note still require deeper pixel/mouse parity testing against original GuiResearchTable.
Thaumonomicon still needs a complete page/icon/recipe gate sweep against the original ConfigResearch and localization data.
Scribing Tools refill is currently JSON/full-stack crafting adapter; a deeper custom recipe may be needed to preserve every original NBT/damage edge-case exactly.
